sourcePrecedence.note: OPT-IN ONLY. Releases 2026-08-25; do not include unless the player opts into the expansion.
must be clearly labeled as playtest

notes: Weapons: name, slug, category, tier (1-4), trait, range, damage (dice string), damageType, burden, feature, url.
Items & consumables show no tier on the SRD (tier=null).
Hope & Fear content is NOT included (unreleased until 2026-08-25; opt-in only).

weapons.name: Broadsword
weapons.feature: Reliable: +1 to attack rolls

weapons.name: Greatstaff
weapons.feature: Powerful: On a successful attack, roll an additional damage die and discard the lowest result.

weapons.name: Greatsword
weapons.feature: Massive: -1 to Evasion; on a successful attack, roll an additional damage die and discard the lowest result.

weapons.feature: Cumbersome: -1 to Finesse

weapons.feature: Returning: When this weapon is thrown within its range, it appears in your hand immediately after the attack.

weapons.name: Retractable Saber

weapons.name: Runes of Ruination

weapons.name: Parrying Dagger
weapons.feature: Parry: When you are attacked, roll this weapon's damage dice. If any of the attacker's damage dice rolled the same value as your dice, the matching results are discarded from the attacker's damage dice before the damage you take is totaled.

weapons.name: Returning Axe
weapons.feature: Returning: When this weapon is thrown within its range, it appears in your hand immediately after the attack.

weapons.name: Powered Gauntlet

weapons.name: Braveshield
weapons.feature: Sheltering: When you mark an Armor Slot, it reduces damage for you and all allies within Melee range of you who took the same damage.

weapons.name: Knuckle Claws
weapons.feature: Doubled Up: When you make an attack with your primary weapon, you can deal damage to another target within Melee range.

weapons.name: Legendary Grappler
weapons.feature: Hooked: On a successful attack, you can pull the target into Melee range.

weapons.feature: Startling: Mark a Stress to crack the whip and force all adversaries within Melee range back to Close range.

weapons.name: Primer Shard
weapons.feature: Locked On: On a successful attack, your next attack against the same target with your primary weapon automatically succeeds.

armor.name: Chainmail Armor
armor.feature: Heavy: -1 to Evasion

armor.name: Full Plate Armor
armor.feature: Very Heavy: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility

armor.name: Gambeson Armor
armor.feature: Flexible: +1 to Evasion

armor.name: Elundrian Chain Armor
armor.feature: Warded: You reduce incoming magic damage by your Armor Score before applying it to your damage thresholds.

armor.name: Harrowbone Armor
armor.feature: Resilient: Before you mark your last Armor Slot, roll a d6. On a result of 6, reduce the severity by one threshold without marking an Armor Slot.

armor.name: Improved Chainmail Armor
armor.feature: Heavy: -1 to Evasion

armor.name: Improved Full Plate Armor
armor.feature: Very Heavy: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility

armor.name: Improved Gambeson Armor
armor.feature: Flexible: +1 to Evasion

armor.name: Irontree Breastplate Armor
armor.feature: Reinforced: When you mark your last Armor Slot, increase your damage thresholds by +2 until you clear at least 1 Armor Slot.

armor.name: Rosewild Armor
armor.feature: Hopeful: When you would spend a Hope, you can mark an Armor Slot instead.

armor.name: Runetan Floating Armor
armor.feature: Shifting: When you are targeted for an attack, you can mark an Armor Slot to give the attack roll against you disadvantage.

armor.name: Tyris Soft Armor
armor.feature: Quiet: You gain a +2 bonus to rolls you make to move silently.

armor.name: Advanced Chainmail Armor
armor.feature: Heavy: -1 to Evasion

armor.name: Advanced Full Plate Armor
armor.feature: Very Heavy: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility

armor.name: Advanced Gambeson Armor
armor.feature: Flexible: +1 to Evasion

armor.name: Bellamoi Fine Armor
armor.feature: Gilded: +1 to Presence

armor.name: Bladefare Armor
armor.feature: Physical: You can't mark an Armor Slot to reduce magic damage.

armor.name: Dragonscale Armor
armor.feature: Impenetrable: Once per short rest, when you would mark your last Hit Point, you can instead mark a Stress.

armor.name: Monett's Cloak
armor.feature: Magic: You can't mark an Armor Slot to reduce physical damage.

armor.name: Runes of Fortification
armor.feature: Painful: Each time you mark an Armor Slot, you must mark a Stress.

armor.name: Spiked Plate Armor
armor.feature: Sharp: On a successful attack against a target within Melee range, add a d4 to the damage roll.

armor.name: Channeling Armor
armor.feature: Channeling: +1 to Spellcast Rolls

armor.name: Dunamis Silkchain
armor.feature: Timeslowing: Mark an Armor Slot to roll a d4 and add its result as a bonus to your Evasion against an incoming attack.

armor.name: Emberwoven Armor
armor.feature: Burning: When an adversary attacks you within Melee range, they mark a Stress.

armor.name: Full Fortified Armor
armor.feature: Fortified: When you mark an Armor Slot, you reduce the severity of an attack by two thresholds instead of one.

armor.name: Legendary Chainmail Armor
armor.feature: Heavy: -1 to Evasion

armor.name: Legendary Full Plate Armor
armor.feature: Very Heavy: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility

armor.name: Legendary Gambeson Armor
armor.feature: Flexible: +1 to Evasion

armor.name: Savior Chainmail
armor.feature: Difficult: -1 to all character traits and Evasion

armor.name: Veritas Opal Armor
armor.feature: Truthseeking: This armor glows when another creature within Close range tells a lie.

items.name: Airblade Charm
items.description: You can attach this charm to a weapon with a Melee range. Three times per rest, you can activate the charm and attack a target within Close range.

items.name: Alistair's Torch
items.description: You can light this magic torch at will. The flame's light fills a much larger space than it should, enough to illuminate a cave bright as day.

items.name: Arcane Cloak
items.description: A creature with a Spellcast trait wearing this cloak can adjust its color, texture, and size at will.

items.name: Arcane Prism
items.description: Position this prism in a location of your choosing and activate it. All allies within Close range of it gain a +1 bonus to their Spellcast Rolls. While activated, the prism can't be moved. Once the prism is deactivated, it can't be activated again until your next long rest.

items.name: Attune Relic
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Instinct. You can only carry one relic.

items.name: Bag Of Ficklesand
items.description: You can convince this small bag of sand to be much heavier or lighter with a successful Presence Roll (10). Additionally, on a successful Finesse Roll (10), you can blow a bit of sand into a target's face to make them temporarily Vulnerable.

items.name: Belt Of Unity
items.description: Once per session, you can spend 5 Hope to lead a Tag Team Roll with three PCs instead of two.

items.name: Bloodstone
items.description: You can attach this stone to a weapon that doesn't already have a feature. The weapon gains the following feature. Brutal: When you roll the maximum value on a damage die, roll an additional damage die.

items.name: Bolster Relic
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Strength. You can only carry one relic.

items.name: Box Of Many Goods
items.description: Once per long rest, you can open this small box and roll a d12. On a result of 1–6, it's empty. On a result of 7–10, it contains one random common consumable. On a result of 11–12, it contains two random common consumables.

items.name: Calming Pendant
items.description: When you would mark your last Stress, roll a d6. On a result of 5 or higher, don't mark it.

items.name: Charging Quiver
items.description: When you succeed on an attack with an arrow stored in this quiver, gain a bonus to the damage roll equal to your current tier.

items.name: Charm Relic
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Presence. You can only carry one relic.

items.name: Clay Companion
items.description: When you sculpt this ball of clay into a clay animal companion, it behaves as that animal. For example, a clay spider can spin clay webs, while a clay bird can fly. The clay companion retains memory and identity across different shapes, but they can adopt new mannerisms with each form.

items.name: Companion Case
items.description: This case can fit a small animal companion. While the companion is inside, the animal and case are immune to all damage and harmful effects.

items.name: Control Relic
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Finesse. You can only carry one relic.

items.name: Corrector Sprite
items.description: This tiny sprite sits in the curve of your ear canal and whispers helpful advice during combat. Once per short rest, you can gain advantage on an attack roll.

items.name: Dual Flask
items.description: This flask can hold two different liquids. You can swap between them by flipping a small switch on the flask's side.

items.name: Elusive Amulet
items.description: Once per long rest, you can activate this amulet to become Hidden until you move. While Hidden in this way, you remain unseen even if an adversary moves to where they would normally see you.

items.name: Empty Chest
items.description: This magical chest appears empty. When you speak a specific trigger word or action and open the chest, you can see the items stored within it.

items.name: Enlighten Relic
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Knowledge. You can only carry one relic.

items.name: Fire Jar
items.description: You can pour out the strange liquid contents of this jar to instantly produce fire. The contents regenerate when you take a long rest.

items.name: Flickerfly Pendant
items.description: While you carry this pendant, your weapons with a Melee range that deal physical damage have a gossamer sheen and can attack targets within Very Close range.

items.name: Gecko Gloves
items.description: You can climb up vertical surfaces and across ceilings.

items.name: Gem Of Alacrity
items.description: You can attach this gem to a weapon, allowing you to use your Agility when making an attack with that weapon.

items.name: Gem Of Audacity
items.description: You can attach this gem to a weapon, allowing you to use your Presence when making an attack with that weapon.

items.name: Gem Of Insight
items.description: You can attach this gem to a weapon, allowing you to use your Instinct when making an attack with that weapon.

items.name: Gem Of Might
items.description: You can attach this gem to a weapon, allowing you to use your Strength when making an attack with that weapon.

items.name: Gem Of Precision
items.description: You can attach this gem to a weapon, allowing you to use your Finesse when making an attack with that weapon.

items.name: Gem Of Sagacity
items.description: You can attach this gem to a weapon, allowing you to use your Knowledge when making an attack with that weapon.

items.name: Glamour Stone
items.description: Activate this pebble-sized stone to memorize the appearance of someone you can see. Spend a Hope to magically recreate this guise on yourself as an illusion.

items.name: Glider
items.description: While falling, you can mark a Stress to deploy this small parachute and glide safely to the ground.

items.name: Greatstone
items.description: You can attach this stone to a weapon that doesn't already have a feature. The weapon gains the following feature. Powerful: On a successful attack, roll an additional damage die and discard the lowest result.

items.name: Homing Compasses
items.description: These two compasses point toward each other no matter how far apart they are.

items.name: Honing Relic
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to an Experience of your choice. You can only carry one relic.

items.name: Hopekeeper Locket
items.description: During a long rest, if you have 6 Hope, you can spend a Hope to imbue this locket with your bountiful resolve. When you have 0 Hope, you can use the locket to immediately gain a Hope. The locket must be re-imbued before it can be used this way again.

items.name: Infinite Bag
items.description: When you store items in this bag, they are kept in a pocket dimension that never runs out of space. You can retrieve an item at any time.

items.name: Lasketider Boots
items.description: You can walk on the surface of water as if it were soft ground.

items.name: Lorekeeper
items.description: You can store the name and details of up to three hostile creatures inside this book. You gain a +1 bonus to action rolls against those creatures.

items.name: Manacles
items.description: This pair of locking cuffs comes with a key.

items.name: Minor Health Potion Recipe
items.description: As a downtime move, you can use a vial of blood to craft a Minor Health Potion.

items.name: Minor Stamina Potion Recipe
items.description: As a downtime move, you can use the bone of a creature to craft a Minor Stamina Potion.

items.name: Mythic Dust Recipe
items.description: As a downtime move, you can use a handful of fine gold dust to craft Mythic Dust.

items.name: Paragon's Chain
items.description: As a downtime move, you can meditate on an ideal or principle you hold dear and focus your will into this chain. Once per long rest, you can spend a Hope to roll a d20 as your Hope Die for rolls that directly align with that principle.

items.name: Phoenix Feather
items.description: If you have at least one Phoenix Feather on you when you fall unconscious, you gain a +1 bonus to the roll you make to determine whether you gain a scar.

items.name: Piercing Arrows
items.description: Three times per rest when you succeed on an attack with one of these arrows, you can add your Proficiency to the damage roll.

items.name: Piper Whistle
items.description: This handcrafted whistle has a distinctive sound. When you blow this whistle, its piercing tone can be heard within a 1-mile radius.

items.name: Portal Seed
items.description: You can plant this seed in the ground to grow a portal in that spot. The portal is ready to use in 24 hours. You can use this portal to travel to any other location where you planted a portal seed. A portal can be destroyed by dealing any amount of magic damage to it.

items.name: Premium Bedroll
items.description: During downtime, you automatically clear a Stress.

items.name: Ring Of Resistance
items.description: Once per long rest, you can activate this ring after a successful attack against you to halve the damage.

items.name: Ring Of Silence
items.description: Spend a Hope to activate this ring. Your footsteps are silent until your next rest.

items.name: Ring Of Unbreakable Resolve
items.description: Once per session, when the GM spends a Fear, you can spend 4 Hope to cancel the effects of that spent Fear.

items.name: Shard Of Memory
items.description: Once per long rest, you can spend 2 Hope to recall a domain card from your vault instead of paying its Recall Cost.

items.name: Skeleton Key
items.description: When you use this key to open a locked door, you gain advantage on the Finesse Roll.

items.name: Speaking Orbs
items.description: This pair of orbs allows any creatures holding them to communicate with each other across any distance.

items.name: Stride Relic
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Agility. You can only carry one relic.

items.name: Suspended Rod
items.description: This flat rod is inscribed with runes. When you activate the rod, it is immediately suspended in place. Until the rod is deactivated, it can't move, doesn't abide by the rules of gravity, and remains in place.

items.name: Valorstone
items.description: You can attach this stone to armor that doesn't already have a feature. The armor gains the following feature. Resilient: Before you mark your last Armor Slot, roll a d6. On a result of 6, reduce the severity by one threshold without marking an Armor Slot.

items.name: Vial Of Darksmoke Recipe
items.description: As a downtime move, you can mark a Stress to craft a Vial of Darksmoke.

items.name: Woven Net
items.description: You can make a Finesse Roll using this net to trap a small creature. A trapped target can break free with a successful Attack Roll (16).

consumables.name: Acidpaste
consumables.description: This paste eats away walls and other surfaces in bright flashes.

consumables.name: Armor Stitcher
consumables.description: You can use this stitcher to spend any number of Hope and clear that many Armor Slots.

consumables.name: Attune Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your next Instinct Roll.

consumables.name: Blinding Orb
consumables.description: You can activate this orb to create a flash of bright light. All targets within Close range become Blinded until they mark HP.

consumables.name: Blood Of The Yorgi
consumables.description: You can drink this blood to disappear from where you are and immediately reappear at a point you can see within very Far range.

consumables.name: Bolster Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your next Strength Roll.

consumables.name: Bonding Honey
consumables.description: This honey can be used to glue two objects together permanently.

consumables.name: Bridge Seed
consumables.description: Thick vines grow from your location to a point of your choice within Far range, allowing you to climb up or across them. The vines dissipate on your next short rest.

consumables.name: Channelstone
consumables.description: You can use this stone to take a spell or grimoire from your vault, use it once, and return it to your vault.

consumables.name: Charm Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your next Presence Roll.

consumables.name: Circle Of The Void
consumables.description: Mark a Stress to create a void that extends up to Far range. No magic can be cast inside the void, and creatures within the void are immune to magic damage.

consumables.name: Control Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your next Finesse Roll.

consumables.name: Death Tea
consumables.description: After you drink this tea, you instantly kill your target when you critically succeed on an attack. If you don't critically succeed on an attack before your next long rest, you die.

consumables.name: Dragonbloom Tea
consumables.description: You can drink this tea to unleash a fiery breath attack. Make an Instinct Roll against all adversaries in front of you within Close range. Targets you succeed against take 2d20 physical damage using your Proficiency.

consumables.name: Dripfang Poison
consumables.description: A creature who consumes this poison takes 8d10 direct magic damage.

consumables.name: Enlighten Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your next Knowledge Roll.

consumables.name: Feast Of Xurla
consumables.description: You can eat this meal to clear all HP and Stress and gain 1d4 Hope.

consumables.name: Featherbone
consumables.description: You can use this bone to control your falling speed for a number of minutes equal to your level.

consumables.name: Gill Salve
consumables.description: You can apply this salve to your neck to breathe underwater for a number of minutes equal to your level.

consumables.name: Grindletooth Venom
consumables.description: You can apply this venom to a weapon that deals physical damage to add a d6 to your next damage roll with that weapon.

consumables.name: Growing Potion
consumables.description: You can drink this potion to double your size until you choose to drop this form or your next rest. While in this form, you have a +2 bonus to Strength and a +1 bonus to your Proficiency.

consumables.name: Health Potion
consumables.description: Clear 1d4+1 HP.

consumables.name: Hornet's Secret Potion
consumables.description: After drinking this potion, the next successful attack you make critically succeeds.

consumables.name: Hopehold Flare
consumables.description: When you use this flare, allies within Close range roll a d6 when they spend a Hope. On a result of 6, they gain the effect of that Hope without spending it. The flare lasts until the end of the scene.

consumables.name: Improved Arcane Shard
consumables.description: You can make a Finesse Roll to throw this shard at a group of adversaries within Far range. Targets you succeed against take 2d20 magic damage.

consumables.name: Improved Grindletooth Venom
consumables.description: You can apply this venom to a weapon that deals physical damage to add a d8 to your next damage roll with that weapon.

consumables.name: Jar Of Lost Voices
consumables.description: You can open this jar to release a deafening echo of voices for a number of minutes equal to your Instinct. Creatures within Far range unprepared for the sound take 6d8 magic damage.

consumables.name: Jumping Root
consumables.description: Eat this root to leap up to Far range once without needing to roll.

consumables.name: Knowledge Stone
consumables.description: If you die while holding this stone, an ally can take a card from your loadout to place in their loadout or vault. After they take this knowledge, the stone crumbles.

consumables.name: Major Arcane Shard
consumables.description: You can make a Finesse Roll to throw this shard at a group of adversaries within Far range. Targets you succeed against take 4d20 magic damage.

consumables.name: Major Attune Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Instinct until your next rest.

consumables.name: Major Bolster Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Strength until your next rest.

consumables.name: Major Charm Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Presence until your next rest.

consumables.name: Major Control Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Finesse until your next rest.

consumables.name: Major Enlighten Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Knowledge until your next rest.

consumables.name: Major Health Potion
consumables.description: Clear 1d4+2 HP.

consumables.name: Major Stamina Potion
consumables.description: Clear 1d4+2 Stress.

consumables.name: Major Stride Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your Agility until your next rest.

consumables.name: Minor Health Potion
consumables.description: Clear 1d4 HP.

consumables.name: Minor Stamina Potion
consumables.description: Clear 1d4 Stress.

consumables.name: Mirror Of Marigold
consumables.description: When you take damage, you can spend a Hope to negate that damage, after which the mirror shatters.

consumables.name: Morphing Clay
consumables.description: You can spend 4 Hope to use this clay, altering your face enough to make you unrecognizable until your next rest.

consumables.name: Mythic Dust
consumables.description: You can apply this dust to a weapon that deals magic damage to add a d12 to your next damage roll with that weapon.

consumables.name: Ogre Musk
consumables.description: You can use this musk to prevent anyone from tracking you by mundane or magical means until your next rest.

consumables.name: Potion Of Stability
consumables.description: You can drink this potion to choose one additional downtime move.

consumables.name: Redthorn Saliva
consumables.description: You can apply this saliva to a weapon that deals physical damage to add a d12 to your next damage roll with that weapon.

consumables.name: Replication Parchment
consumables.description: By touching this piece of parchment to another, you can perfectly copy the second parchment's contents. Once used, this parchment becomes mundane paper.

consumables.name: Shrinking Potion
consumables.description: You can drink this potion to halve your size until you choose to drop this form or your next rest. While in this form, you have a +2 bonus to Agility and a -1 penalty to your Proficiency.

consumables.name: Sleeping Sap
consumables.description: You can drink this potion to fall asleep for a full night's rest. You clear all Stress upon waking.

consumables.name: Snap Powder
consumables.description: Mark a Stress and clear a HP.

consumables.name: Stamina Potion
consumables.description: Clear 1d4+1 Stress.

consumables.name: Stardrop
consumables.description: You can use this stardrop to summon a hailstorm of comets that deals 8d20 physical damage to all targets within Very Far range.

consumables.name: Stride Potion
consumables.description: You gain a +1 bonus to your next Agility Roll.

consumables.name: Sun Tree Sap
consumables.description: Consume this sap to roll a d6. On a result of 5–6, clear 2 HP. On a result of 2–4, clear 3 Stress. On a result of 1, see through the veil of death and return unscathed, gaining one scar.

consumables.name: Sweet Moss
consumables.description: You can consume this moss during a rest to clear 1d10 HP or 1d10 Stress.

consumables.name: Unstable Arcane Shard
consumables.description: You can make a Finesse Roll to throw this shard at a group of adversaries within Far range. Targets you succeed against take 1d20 magic damage.

consumables.name: Varik Leaves
consumables.description: You can eat these paired leaves to immediately gain 2 Hope.

consumables.name: Vial Of Darksmoke
consumables.description: When an adversary attacks you, use this vial and roll a number of d6 equal to your Agility. Add the highest result to your Evasion against the attack.

consumables.name: Vial Of Moondrip
consumables.description: When you drink the contents of this vial, you can see in total darkness until your next rest.

consumables.name: Wingsprout
consumables.description: You gain magic wings that allow you to fly for a number of minutes equal to your level.
